description: A corporate suite holder needs to provide a list of guests who will be attending the game and need access to the suite.

nodes.task_description: Receive the guest list from the suite holder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the list of names for the suite.

nodes.task_description: Upload the guest list to the venue's access control system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the guests to the system.

nodes.task_description: Provide the suite holder with instructions on how their guests can check in on game day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends clear instructions to the suite holder.
